channel.title: The Git Times
channel.description: AI-generated newspaper for builders — daily coverage of trending GitHub projects

item.title: Lightpanda Delivers Zig-Built Headless Browser for Lightning-Fast AI Automation
item.description: “We drive into the future using only our rearview mirror.” — Marshall McLuhan

item.title: GitHub Repo Exposes System Prompts Fueling Top AI Coding Agents
item.description: “Civilization advances by extending the number of important operations which we can perform without thinking about them.” — Alfred North Whitehead

item.title: Reverse-Engineered APIs Unlock Neural Training on Apple Neural Engine
item.description: “Sometimes it is the people no one imagines anything of who do the things that no one can imagine.” — Alan Turing

item.title: Claude Context Mode Compresses Tool Outputs to Salvage AI Context Windows
item.description: “Premature optimization is the root of all evil.” — Donald Knuth

item.title: CoPaw Launches as Self-Hosted AI Assistant for Developers
item.description: “Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.” — Arthur C. Clarke

item.title: OpenClaw's memory-lancedb-pro Plugin Supercharges Agent Memory with Hybrid Retrieval
item.description: “Errors using inadequate data are much less than those using no data at all.” — Charles Babbage
